overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic Japanese-inspired urban plaza at night. The scene transitions from a covered corridor with traditional paper lanterns to an open commercial area with neon signs, digital billboards, and various NPCs. The environment features wet reflective pavement, mixed traditional and cyberpunk architecture, and dense neon lighting in green and purple hues.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with traditional Japanese decor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered corridor, passing vending machines and traditional lanterns

notable_agents.action: figure standing near the corridor exit in the distance

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with fluorescent lighting covering the walkway
traditional Japanese paper lanterns with red frames hanging from ceiling
large structural pillars painted green with metallic finish
illuminated advertisement poster showing food items with Japanese text
reflective green tiled floor showing wet surface reflections
small manicured tree in planter box along the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a covered pedestrian corridor with traditional Japanese architectural elements. Red and white paper lanterns hang from the ceiling, casting a warm glow against the green-tiled floor. The walls feature vending machines and posters, while potted trees add greenery to the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with seating and neon signage

events.description: exits the covered corridor into an open plaza with visible sky and city buildings
moves from green artificial corridor lighting to open night sky with mixed neon illumination

agents.ego_description: emerging from the covered walkway into the open plaza, approaching a group sitting on benches

notable_agents.action: group of three people sitting on concrete bench in the plaza center

entered.detail: wide open pedestrian area with view of surrounding city buildings
large pink neon sign shaped like a heart on building facade
large orange neon sign shaped like a fist next to the heart sign
low concrete seating structures arranged in the plaza center
elevated highway or monorail track structure with concrete supports
high-rise commercial buildings with illuminated windows surrounding the plaza

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered corridor, the scene opens into a spacious urban plaza under the night sky. The camera approaches a group of NPCs sitting on concrete benches, with large neon heart and fist signs glowing on a building in the distance. An elevated overpass structure dominates the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with commercial signage and traditional architecture

events.description: turns right to follow the plaza edge along the overpass structure
entering denser commercial area with large digital billboards becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the plaza perimeter, passing NPCs leaning on railings and walking in various directions

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and red skirt walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large circular purple neon sign with Japanese text reading 'KIROSHI'
tall building with multiple illuminated advertisement screens
wooden pagoda-style roof overhang with green tiles on building entrance
traditional white paper lanterns hanging along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to follow the plaza edge, walking alongside an elevated overpass structure. Traditional Japanese architectural elements mix with cyberpunk neon, including a prominent purple KIROSHI sign. Various NPCs populate the walkway, including a woman in distinctive red skirt walking toward the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian street with giant digital advertisements

events.description: approaching large digital billboard area with prominent character advertisement
moving into area with dominant purple neon lighting from building facade

agents.ego_description: walking through the commercial district, passing various pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: muscular man in tank top walking past the camera

entered.detail: giant billboard displaying animated character with green hair and Japanese text
building facade illuminated with purple neon strip lighting along the roofline
wooden market stalls with traditional Japanese architectural details
scattered litter and trash bags along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dense commercial area dominated by a massive digital billboard showing an animated character. The right side features a building with striking purple neon lighting, while traditional wooden stalls line the left. The pavement shows urban decay with scattered debris and trash.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with hotel and market entrance

events.description: entering plaza area with prominent hotel signage and market entrance
approaching the MAGAMI MARKET entrance with traditional gate structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward the market entrance, passing pedestrians and street vendors in the plaza

notable_agents.action: person in bright blue pants and red boots walking across the plaza

entered.detail: large blue neon sign with Japanese text 'HOテル' indicating hotel entrance
traditional Japanese gate structure with 'MAGAMI MARKET' signage and red lanterns
wooden vendor stalls with merchandise displays in the plaza center
pink illuminated vending machine near the market entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a plaza dominated by a large blue hotel neon sign and approaches the MAGAMI MARKET entrance with its traditional Japanese gate. The ground returns to green tiled patterns near the market, with various NPCs and street vendors populating the space. The camera heads toward the market canopy as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, traditional corridor into a sprawling, neon-lit cyberpunk plaza at night. It begins inside a covered pedestrian walkway where red and white paper lanterns cast a warm glow over green-tiled floors and potted trees. As the camera exits the enclosure, the space opens into a wide urban plaza under a dark sky, revealing concrete benches and distant glowing neon signs in the shape of hearts and fists. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right to follow the edge of the plaza, moving alongside a massive elevated overpass where traditional architecture blends with vibrant purple KIROSHI signage. Finally, the movement continues past various NPCs, including a woman in a red skirt, as the environment becomes increasingly dense with futuristic commercial elements.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dense commercial district that gradually opens into a traditional Japanese market plaza. It begins by navigating a crowded street dominated by a massive animated digital billboard, passing between purple neon-lit buildings and rustic wooden stalls over debris-strewn pavement. As the camera advances, the urban decay gives way to a more open plaza defined by a towering blue hotel neon sign. The scene then shifts toward the Magami Market entrance, where the ground transforms into green tiled patterns amidst a crowd of NPCs and street vendors. Finally, the camera moves past a traditional Japanese gate and heads directly toward the market canopy.
